StyledText.Data: Theme text styles in <<FAT Title::Reference title>>

Calculation.Text: IsEmpty (FAT Title::Base project) Or IsEmpty (FAT Package::Local export type) Or notDeveloper
"View all media with subtitles in title"
"View all text styles defined in title"

StyledText.Data: Add new custom text style or edit existing. Change text style names for clarification.
Font family Font size Font weight. Line height Letter space Color Alignment

Calculation.Text: FAT Theme Color::Predefined Color Name = "primary" Or FAT Theme Color::Predefined Color Name = "interaction" Or FAT Theme Color::Predefined Color Name = "success" Or FAT Theme Color::Predefined Color Name = "fail"
"Check how many times this color is referenced in this Title"

StyledText.Data: <<FAT Theme TextStyle::Predefined Text style Name>> Style type: <<FAT Theme TextStyle::Type>>
Theme textstyles. Can be chosen in page item, page, chapter and package settings from Funkis Player version 1.13 and forward.
Created by: <<FAT Theme TextStyle::CreatedBy>> <<FAT Theme TextStyle::CreationTimestamp>> • Modified by: <<FAT Theme TextStyle::ModifiedBy>> <<FAT Theme TextStyle::ModificationTimestamp>>
